requestText: Finish Storybook primitive and state coverage for reusable motifs, dark mode, and inspection parity. Add direct stories for mockup-derived primitives and important variants. Add story controls for configurable props that materially affect hierarchy, ornament, metadata, framing, and composition. Add dark-mode and interaction-state stories for surfaces where contrast and state handling are part of the acceptance criteria. Tighten story organization so Storybook reads like a reusable package, not just a preview gallery. Keep mock gallery stories useful, but do not let them carry the primary burden of reusable-surface inspection.
